_comment: Quarantined bounded-open values (SC-0023). Used-once coin-flips with no frequency data: deliberately NOT promoted into approved-enumerations.json (so they are NOT settled types), but NOT silently excluded either. The validator surfaces every use as a `quarantined` NOTICE (severity `quarantined`, not `drift`, not silently-approved), and a RECURRENCE — the same value appearing in two or more pericopes — as an explicit RECURS notice in the corpus `quarantine watch`. A RECURS is the signal that frequency data has arrived and the value should be revisited: promote-with-provenance (it is a real type) or collapse (confirmed a one-off). Vendored + pinned (check-drift); edits are governed (SC-ref + provenance), like coverage-exceptions.json / lint-exceptions.json. Provenance: the SC-0022 comm-func triage kept all 16 leading verbs but Marcia quarantined the 8 used-once near-synonyms for the P08–P14 revisit; SC-0022 erroneously promoted them as settled; SC-0023 un-settles them here. SC-0025 (2026-06-05) adds the action axis: the 7 Thread-A held sentence-shaped action labels (SC-0024), where meaning and form diverge, are quarantined here so action enforcement does not silently bless them as types; they are the Thread B fidelity-model prototype corpus, resolved by Thread B (not frequency).

action.reason: Thread A held label (SC-0024): meaning and form diverge (sentence-shaped, carries load-bearing detail not reducible to a bare verb). Deliberately NOT collapsed in SC-0024 and NOT enforced as a type; it is the Thread B fidelity-model prototype corpus. Resolution is Thread B (preserve vs render), not frequency; RECURS is a secondary signal if P07-P14 reuse it.
